  1. Home

  3. Custom Car Magnets

Custom Car Magnets

Full-Color Car Magnets

â˜…â˜…â˜…â˜…â˜…

Read All Reviews
  • Order Process
  • Production Times
  • Cut Options
  • Artwork
  • Shipping

Design Methods

Design from Scratch

With our easy to use online designer, you can quickly design your custom car magnet. Just upload an image or logo from your computer or choose from our wide selection of clipart to create your personalized car magnet.

Upload a File

If you decide to upload an original file, instead of designing your own, you will need to upload an .eps file. This ensures that you will receive the highest quality custom car magnet possible! Once you have added your product to your cart and select your shipping method, a proof will be emailed to you. When you approve your proof and make a payment, your order will be complete.

Payment

All orders must be paid up front prior to being put into production. We accept VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards. We also accept checks, which must be received prior to your custom car magnet being put into production. 

Live Order Tracking

Back in the early days of making decals, we built a system called Live Order Tracking that enables our customers to track their order through every stage of our streamlined process, from order placement to delivery.

After placing your order for custom car magnet, you’ll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email that will allow you to track your car magnet every step of the way. Need the current status of your order? Just click the link in the email and get the most recent updates from our dynamic Live Order Tracking system.

Production Time Tables

Our flexible production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option. 

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5 Day Saver option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

Magnet Finishing Options

The standard finishing option for magnetic signs is square cut with rounded corners. You also have the option to select your magnet to be die cut or square cut. All magnetic signs include a laminate finish.

Die Cut

Square Cut with Rounded Corners

Square Cut

Artwork Specifications

Preferred Files for Printing

The maximum file size we accept is 100 MB. Our preferred file types are:

  • Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated Post Script)
  • PDF (Adobe PDF)

When submitting these files, make sure you convert all fonts to outlines or curves to ensure they print correctly and the fonts are not substituted. 

Additional Files Accepted

  • JPG (High Resolution JPEG)
  • TIFF (High Resolution TIFF)
  • PNG (High Resolution PNG)

File Tips

  • Set up size proportionate to the exact size product you are ordering 
  • Convert all text to outlines 
  • Only Allow for bleed if necessary
  • Never flatten/merge layers in a PSD file
  • Indicate the cut line clearly for all decal products

Vector Art

Vector art consists of lines and curves that are mathematically defined objects. When viewing art in key line mode you can see the points or vectors when connecting your lines and curves. They can also be seen when using the pen tool or editing the points along a path. Vector art is ideal for type and drawn shapes because they can be enlarged to any size while maintaining crisp outlines and details without sacrificing quality. The distance between the vectors is calculated mathematically and is not dependent upon resolution. 

Raster Art

Raster images consist of colored squares, called pixels. They are created by combining a series of various colored pixels. Digital photographs are made up of pixels. If you view a raster image at 200% or more you are able to see the individual pixels that make up the image. Raster images are dependent upon resolution so image enlargement is limited by the individual size at which the file was created. If a file is produced at a size that is larger than its resolution will allow, the quality will decrease. Printing a low resolution file will result in pixelation. Individual pixels are large enough to be easily discernable. Increasing the resolution will not solve this problem is there are not enough pixels to begin with. The program will add more pixels based upon the estimation of their location and will then assign their neighboring pixels's color value. This may cause an image to look muddy. 

If submitting these files, please follow the guidelines below:

  • 100% scale (full size output) at 100 dpi
  • 50% scale at 200 dpi or higher
  • 25% scale at 300 dpi or higher
  • 10% scale at 600-1200 dpi recommended

Design Services

If you are not able to provide us with a good quality image, we do have a vectorizing/recreating service available. Most logos or images can be recreated for as little as $15; however images with more detail are subject to quoting prior to vectorizing the image. Please contact a sales representative for more details.

This service needs to be paid for in advance of us printing your order. We will keep your recreated vector artwork on file for you to use on all future orders.

Releasing the recreated vector artwork to you for personal use can be done for an additional cost.

Shipping

  • You can expect your Decals.com order to arrive within 2 - 4 business days (after production time) to 90% of the United States.
  • Unless otherwise specified, at the time of ordering, your custom car magnets will ship via UPS Ground.
  • If you have any questions about shipping rates or rush production, please contact our friendly Customer Service Representatives at (320) 391-5250 prior to ordering.
  • You will receive a tracking number once your package has shipped.
  • To read more about our shipping information visit our shipping policy page.

Shipping Methods:

  • Economy (5-15 Days)
  • Standard (3-5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)

Important Economy Shipping Notes:

  • If choosing economy shipping, please include additional postal information such as your P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.
  • Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to. 

National and International Shipping Notes:

  • Decals.com ships throughout the United States and Internationally.
  • All international shipments must have shipping labels as well as customs documentation provided by the customers. We will only accept international shipping labels from the following carriers, USPS and UPS.
  • Contact a Customer Service Representative at (320) 391-5250 for more information.

Custom stickers were all the rage for a very long time, but the time has come for custom magnets to shine. We often overlook the unused metallic surfaces all around us, because stickers stick to just about any smooth, non-porous surface.

These spaces are unused advertising real estate. A car magnet can offer more versatility and easy repositioning than car decals. Use the empty space on your vehicle for large, mobile business cards.

Our custom car magnets are easy to create using our online design tool. Choose from one of our premade design templates, upload your own artwork or work with a graphic designer. Our magnets are fully customizable so add images, text and your own touch. Your vehicle surface is your canvas.

      More About Magnets for Cars Return to Top

      Take your marketing campaign to new places, literally, with a car magnet. Mobile advertising is all the rage in our bustling society. These products work great as magnetic car signs or moving yard signs. 

      Car magnets attract far more attention than a mere bumper sticker. Many delivery businesses use magnetic car signs instead of car decals or wraps because of their ease of repositioning and size. 

      Magnets come in a variety of shapes and sizes.  We offer a die-cut option that is cut to the contour of your design. Our magnetic products are printed in full CMYK color with full bleed, so there will not be a border interfering with your vehicle background. 

      Customer Reviews ... Reviews

      â˜…â˜…â˜…â˜…â˜…

      Don't take our word for it! See what others are saying.

      See Our Reviews More Reviews

      Why Choose Decals.com?

      Customer Service

      Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

      Made in the USA

      All of our products are proudly made and manufactured here in the USA!

       

      Fast Turnaround

      Standard turnaround time ships your product within three business days.

      Track Your Order

      Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary live order tracking system.

      Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top

      Product Information

      What material are your magnets made out of?

      Our custom car magnets are constructed from sturdy 30 mil magnetic material. The magnet surface is equipped with a UV, scratch and water-resistant laminate.

      What metallic surfaces do magnets stick to?

      Magnets will cling to any Ferromagnetic materials. These are magnetic receptive rare earth minerals that include: iron, nickel, steel and cobalt. Most car doors are made out of these types of materials and that is why magnets so readily stick to them.
       
      * Due to the different alloy composition, magnets will not cling to stainless steel or aluminum. *

      So, can I leave my magnet on in the car wash?

      While the magnets have water-resistant laminate, the force and friction of the car wash brushes will probably strip off the magnet and it will get left behind. We recommend that you remove the magnet from your vehicle, prior to entering the car wash.

      How many magnets may I order?

      You may order a single magnet or 1,000. The more magnets that you order, the larger bulk discount you will receive.

      My car magnet is giving me trouble, why won’t it stick?

      Most likely, the problem is that your car body is non-magnetic. Magnets will not cling to aluminum or plastic. Your vehicle owner's manual should list the composition of your car body. If you discover that your car has non-magnetic receptive doors, then try some of our custom car decals.

      Are your magnets compatible with all vehicles?

      Our custom car magnets adhere effectively to the majority of vehicles, contingent upon the specific surface characteristics of the car.

      As automotive manufacturers increasingly adopt lightweight materials like aluminum, fiberglass, carbon fiber, stainless steel, and plastic, traditional steel components are being replaced, impacting magnet adhesion.

      It's essential to note that our magnets exclusively adhere to magnetic metal surfaces, encompassing: Iron, Nickel, Cobalt and Steel.

      Are your car magnets waterproof?

      Our magnetic products are designed with a water-resistant laminate. This laminate will help protect your magnet, but just remember that water is a very powerful element that can have damaging effects over time.

      Can my magnet be made to match the shape of my artwork?

      Yes, we offer die-cut magnets that will follow the contour of your design. Simply select die-cut when selecting your product option, then upload your design.

      Can I write on my magnet?

      Yes, you can either use a sharpie to write permanent messaging or use a dry erase marker for a temporary message, like for calendars or shopping lists. The sharpie should be wiped off with a light chemical agent or warm soapy water.

      Can I add my own artwork and designs to my magnet?

      You can absolutely add your very own designs. Using the online designer tool, you can upload your own artwork or add images to the pre-made templates. Customize your magnet how you’d like and if you need any assistance, then contact one of our helpful customer service representatives at (320) 391-5250.

      What are your magnets commonly used for?

      A lot of food delivery places use them as temporary mobile signage because they are less of a pain to remove and reapply than car window decals. Another benefit is that you can use your personal vehicle for work by simply adding or subtracting your magnet. 

      Taxi companies that use Fleet vehicles can also utilize car magnets in a similar fashion. 

      Smaller designs also have their own magic. One idea might be to create magnetic rack cards for promotional purposes. This would be ideal for repair service vehicles that stay parked for long periods of time.

      Order Your Car Magnets

Magnet Finishing Options The standard finishing option for magnetic signs is square cut with rounded corners. You also have the option to select your magnet to be die cut or square cut. All magnetic signs include a laminate finish. Die Cut Square Cut with Rounded Corners Square Cut Artwork Specifications Preferred Files for Printing The maximum file size we accept is 100 MB. Our preferred file types are: Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated Post Script) PDF (Adobe PDF) When submitting these files, make sure you convert all fonts to outlines or curves to ensure they print correctly and the fonts are not substituted. Additional Files Accepted JPG (High Resolution JPEG) TIFF (High Resolution TIFF) PNG (High Resolution PNG) File Tips Set up size proportionate to the exact size product you are ordering Convert all text to outlines Only Allow for bleed if necessary Never flatten/merge layers in a PSD file Indicate the cut line clearly for all decal products Vector Art Vector art consists of lines and curves that are mathematically defined objects. When viewing art in key line mode you can see the points or vectors when connecting your lines and curves. They can also be seen when using the pen tool or editing the points along a path. Vector art is ideal for type and drawn shapes because they can be enlarged to any size while maintaining crisp outlines and details without sacrificing quality. The distance between the vectors is calculated mathematically and is not dependent upon resolution. Raster Art Raster images consist of colored squares, called pixels. They are created by combining a series of various colored pixels. Digital photographs are made up of pixels. If you view a raster image at 200% or more you are able to see the individual pixels that make up the image. Raster images are dependent upon resolution so image enlargement is limited by the individual size at which the file was created. If a file is produced at a size that is larger than its resolution will allow, the quality will decrease. Printing a low resolution file will result in pixelation. Individual pixels are large enough to be easily discernable. Increasing the resolution will not solve this problem is there are not enough pixels to begin with. The program will add more pixels based upon the estimation of their location and will then assign their neighboring pixels's color value. This may cause an image to look muddy. If submitting these files, please follow the guidelines below: 100% scale (full size output) at 100 dpi 50% scale at 200 dpi or higher 25% scale at 300 dpi or higher 10% scale at 600-1200 dpi recommended Design Services If you are not able to provide us with a good quality image, we do have a vectorizing/recreating service available. Most logos or images can be recreated for as little as $15; however images with more detail are subject to quoting prior to vectorizing the image. Please contact a sales representative for more details. This service needs to be paid for in advance of us printing your order. We will keep your recreated vector artwork on file for you to use on all future orders. Releasing the recreated vector artwork to you for personal use can be done for an additional cost.
